methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Joby Aviation
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Public), post-money $10B+

private.name: Archer Aviation

data.narrative:
ideaForge is a publicly listed company in the Drones & Autonomous sector, having raised $50M+ to date and founded by Ankit Mehta. The comparable universe for this company is limited: the sector contains 6 private peers (including Joby Aviation, Archer Aviation, Nuro, Elroy Air, and Aurora Innovation) but zero public comparables, presenting a sparse peer set for valuation triangulation.

The peer-median method is not applicable to this analysis. The Drones & Autonomous sector contains only four same-sector peers total, but filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation-tier comparables yields fewer than three datapoints—the minimum threshold required for reliable median-based valuation. Relying on an all-sector median would introduce material distortion given the heterogeneity of business models, technology maturity, and commercial deployment timelines within autonomous systems.

As a result, this valuation cannot be supported through conventional triangulation methods at this time. Any credible valuation range would require either: (i) expansion of the peer set to adjacent sectors with defensible structural similarities, (ii) application of discounted cash flow or comparable transaction analysis if sufficient financial or M&A data exists, or (iii) explicit acknowledgment that the company trades on private market dynamics unanchored to public benchmarks. The key uncertainty is the absence of public market pricing for this stage and sector combination.
